title: Animated Helmets
description: Wouldnt you want lots of different flavours in one?
body:
### Angelos'
# Animated Helmets
This resourcepack adds lots of turtle helmet variants that you can use by renaming the turtle shell!
ㅤ
# Discord Server You can join our Discord server to report bugs, give suggestions and try early access!
**Angelos' Workshop** [ ](https://discord.gg/qMrDaZZCdG)
# Requirements This pack requires **Entity Model Features** and **Entity Texture Features** 1.21.9+
